description: Clean up an inherited GPredict installation for Coast Guard auxiliary operations by deleting the 'TestSats' and 'OldWeather' modules while ensuring the 'Amateur' module remains. Create a new module named 'SARSAT' containing five search-and-rescue satellites: NOAA 15 (NORAD 25338), NOAA 18 (NORAD 28654), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), METOP-B (NORAD 38771), and METOP-C (NORAD 43689). Add ground stations for Coast Guard Sector Boston (42.3541 N, 71.0488 W, 5m altitude) and Coast Guard Training Center Cape May, NJ (38.9351 N, 74.9060 W, 3m altitude), and set the Boston station as the default in the application preferences. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'. GPredict is already open.
